name: toggle
description: A two-state pressed <button> (WAI-ARIA APG Toggle Button: aria-pressed) with four variants (outline/ghost/primary/secondary), three toolbar-aligned sizes (sm/md/lg), optional leading/trailing slots, and icon-only square mode. The pressed state is server-owned (data down); CSS [aria-pressed=true] drives the visual without JS. Click wired via wireClick + wireArgs (SAFE escaped) or a static attrs string (TRUSTED raw). Server-first replacement for the Lit island toggle.
docs: Copies the toggle partial to your JTE root at lievit/toggle.jte, reached as @template.lievit.toggle(...). Render `pressed` from the controller; wire `wireClick` (SAFE action name) + `wireArgs` (SAFE Map) to the action that flips it. `variant` (outline|ghost|primary|secondary), `size` (sm|md|lg). For icon-only toggles set `iconOnly=true` and supply `ariaLabel`. Use `leading` / `trailing` content slots for icons or badges flanking the label. Dynamic data-* go through `dataAttrs` (SAFE escaped Map); static directives go through `attrs` (TRUSTED raw). The source is yours: edit freely.
